refined_caption: A rodent is visible in the hospital room, near a bag of luggage. The rodent appears to be in close proximity to patient belongings.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room, right next to my luggage. This is completely unacceptable and I'm worried about the cleanliness and safety of the hospital. I demand that something be done about this immediately.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, it's right next to my bag, this is disgusting. Can someone please do something about it?
